name: io.github.nhilbert/merkraum
title: Merkraum
description: Auditable knowledge memory for AI agents. 26 MCP tools: belief tracking, managed forgetting, PII detection (EN+DE), certainty governance, full audit trail. Neo4j graph + Qdrant semantic search. EU-hosted.

environmentVariables.name: MERKRAUM_PAT
environmentVariables.description: Personal Access Token for authentication (get from app.merkraum.de → Settings → API Access)
